primary.description: Primary skill ID for this workflow

name.description: Variable name used to reference this value in conditions, checkpoints, and templates

description.description: Human-readable description of this variable's purpose

defaultValue.description: Initial value assigned when workflow starts

required.description: Whether this variable must be set during workflow execution

mode.description: Defines a workflow execution mode that modifies standard behavior

activationVariable.description: Variable name that activates this mode when true

recognition.description: Patterns to detect mode activation from user intent

skipActivities.description: Activity IDs to skip entirely in this mode

defaults.description: Default variable values when mode is active

resource.description: Path to resource file with detailed mode guidance

artifactLocation.description: Defines a named artifact storage location referenced by activity artifacts

path.description: Path pattern for this location. Supports workflow variable interpolation (e.g., '{planning_folder_path}')

description.description: Description of what artifacts this location stores

gitignored.description: Whether artifacts in this location are gitignored from the host project

tags.description: Categorization labels for discovery and filtering

rules.description: Rules that govern workflow execution (string array of ordered imperative directives). Agents MUST follow these rules throughout all activities. Note: skill schemas use a different format (object with named key-value rule pairs).

modes.description: Execution modes that modify standard workflow behavior

artifactLocations.description: Named artifact storage locations. Keys are location identifiers referenced by activity artifact definitions (e.g., 'planning'), values define path patterns and metadata.

skills.description: LEGACY: Workflow-level primary skill reference. Prefer skill_operations.

operations.description: Flat array of skill-id::operation-name references the workflow uses at orchestrator level. Bundled into get_workflow responses alongside core orchestrator operations.

initialActivity.description: ID of the first activity to execute. Required for sequential workflows, optional when all activities are independent entry points.

oneOf.description: Activity filename (e.g., '01-start.toon' or 'work-package/02-design-philosophy.toon') resolved by the workflow loader

activities.description: Activities that comprise this workflow. May be specified as filenames (resolved by the workflow loader at runtime) or inline activity objects.
